title: Amethyst in More Recipes
description: Makes Amethyst replace some ingredients in some crafting recipes.
body:
This project has been archived and will no longer get updates. Feel free to continue updating it yourself.

Makes Amethyst replace some ingredients in some crafting recipes.


### Current crafting recipes (see Gallery for recipes)
```
Jukebox
Note Block
Daylight Sensor
Beacon
End Crystal
```

### Credits
[thisisnotaustin](https://modrinth.com/user/thisisnotaustin) for the recipes ideas.

[destruc7i0n](https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/) for making a website that makes it much easier to make recipe datapacks.
